title: Ad Dammām Heat Wave
lead: A critical heat wave is affecting Ad Dammām with a Z-Score of +4.00. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Ad Dammām is causing temperatures to soar, with a CDD of 13.0 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 35%, and the wind speed is 6.9 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
